generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder measuring hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart position sensor for monitoring cart movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist position sensor for monitoring hoist movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionSensor
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionSensor
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB including swing angle, wind speed, cart position, and hoist position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, CartPositionDataTransmitted, HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created using Autodesk Fusion360 for physical structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling"
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for historical data logging and time-series storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization tool for dashboard notifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, VisualizationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for kinematic model and trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for monitoring sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorControllers : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controllers for controlling cart and hoist motors"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectory
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization of crane state and data"
    DTDFVocab:provides Visualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing simulated vs. actual trajectories with threshold-based alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationBreachesNotification
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for trajectory testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time series classification for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetection
]

instance OptimalTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for crane movement"
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for crane operations"
]

instance Visualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization of crane state and data"
]

instance ValidationBreachesNotification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard notifications for validation breaches enabling operator decisions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation service results for trajectory testing"
]

instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time series classification for fault detection"
]

instance CraneDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TrajectoryGeneratorService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, VisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service sent to physical crane via Control Application and Crane Interface."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane with motors, sensors, and controllers; physical interface and control applications; digital twin services interconnected via MQTT and database for data flow and service orchestration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and as operated (real-time data logging and validation) lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between measured and simulated trajectories; alerts when exceeding threshold for system health."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for inter-service communication; TimescaleDB for time-series data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; Python gantrylib module for other components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering; ad-hoc approach without specific digital twin standards."
]
